title: Property Consultant - Prestige Estates - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Prestige Estates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!
